homepage.heroSubline: Transforming Boston's historic homes with timeless bath remodels. Locally crafted solutions designed for New England's unique climate and architecture.
aboutText: Founded in 2012, Horizon Bath Remodel began with a simple mission: to bring European craftsmanship standards to Boston's distinctive homes. Our team of artisan plumbers and tile setters grew from a small South End workshop to serving the entire metro area.

We approach each project as a collaboration, blending your vision with our expertise in moisture management and historic home preservation. Every wall tile is leveled with precision, every fixture installed to withstand freeze-thaw cycles.
As proud members of the Boston Preservation Alliance, we're committed to maintaining the character of our city's architecture while incorporating modern performance standards.

valueProps.title: Historic Home Specialists
valueProps.description: We navigate the quirks of Boston's aging plumbing systems with solutions that preserve original charm while improving function.

valueProps.title: Climate-Responsive Materials
valueProps.description: From anti-microbial grout for humid summers to freeze-resistant fixtures, we specify materials built for New England's extremes.

valueProps.title: Full-Service Convenience
valueProps.description: Complete project management from permits to final clean-up, handling all trades under one roof.

valueProps.title: Transparent Process
valueProps.description: Weekly progress updates with detailed timelines, so you're never left wondering about next steps.

homepage.ctaSubline: Schedule a complimentary design consultation at your home or via video chat.

services.name: Complete Bathroom Renovation
services.shortDescription: Full transformation from studs to finishes, tailored to your home's architecture.
services.description:
Our comprehensive renovation service reimagines your entire bath space while respecting your home's structural integrity. In Boston's older homes, we frequently address uneven floors, out-of-plumb walls, and outdated plumbing configurations with solutions that maintain historic character.

For Back Bay brownstones, we specialize in replicating original tile patterns and matching historic moldings. In newer constructions like Seaport condos, we implement cutting-edge wet room designs with linear drains. Every project includes moisture barrier installation critical for our humid summers and proper ventilation to prevent winter condensation issues.
process: Step 1: Discovery consultation assessing your home's plumbing capacity and structural considerations
Step 2: 3D design presentation showing material options suited to Boston's climate
Step 3: Careful demolition with dust containment systems for cleaner air quality
Step 4: Final walkthrough with moisture testing and operation tutorials for all systems
benefits: Increased home value with high-ROI improvements
Custom storage solutions for Boston's typically compact baths
Improved water efficiency with low-flow fixtures that actually perform
Lifetime craftsmanship warranty on tile work

faq.question: How do you handle uneven floors in older homes?
faq.answer: We use adjustable pedestal systems under vanities and laser-leveling techniques for tile, avoiding costly floor restructuring when possible.

faq.question: What's your approach to small Boston bathrooms?
faq.answer: We maximize every inch with custom recessed storage, glass shower enclosures, and space-saving floating vanities that maintain openness.

services.name: Walk-In Shower Conversion
services.shortDescription: Transform outdated tubs into accessible, luxurious showers with proper waterproofing.
services.description:
Converting tubs to walk-in showers requires particular attention to waterproofing in our freeze-thaw climate. We install multiple layers of protection: rubberized membranes beneath tile, sloped mortar beds, and epoxy grout resistant to temperature fluctuations.

For Victorian homes in Cambridge, we design period-appropriate subway tile showers with nickel fixtures. In Newton's Colonials, we often incorporate marble thresholds and built-in seating. Our frameless glass enclosures maintain sightlines while containing steam effectively, with hardware that withstands Boston's mineral-rich water.

Every conversion includes grab bar reinforcement (whether visible or behind walls) and proper pitch toward linear drains - critical details many contractors overlook in our service area.
process: Step 1: Structural assessment of existing alcove walls and floor framing
Step 2: Custom shower pan construction with precise 1/4" per foot slope
Step 3: Multiple waterproofing layers tested before tile installation
Step 4: Final inspection of all seals and caulk joints
benefits: Eliminates dangerous tub-step transitions
Reduces humidity with properly vented designs
Increases accessibility without clinical appearance
Prevents leaks that can damage historic wood framing

faq.question: Do walk-in showers make bathrooms feel colder?
faq.answer: We install radiant floor heating systems in most conversions, along with strategically placed towel warmers for cozy comfort during Boston winters.

faq.question: How do you prevent glass shower doors from spotting?
faq.answer: We use commercial-grade glass with permanent hydrophobic coatings and recommend our maintenance-free water softening systems.

services.name: Period-Correct Restoration
services.shortDescription: Preserving historic details while upgrading mechanical systems for modern living.
services.description:
Boston's architectural treasures deserve bath spaces that honor their origins. Our restoration specialists research original materials and techniques used in your home's era, from clawfoot tub refinishing to hex tile reproduction.

For South End brownstones, we source authentic subway tile with proper 1/16" spacing and lime-based grout. In Beacon Hill's Federal homes, we recreate paneled wainscoting and pedestal sinks with modern plumbing guts. We even offer salvaged fixtures from Boston Architectural Salvage when appropriate.

Behind the scenes, we discreetly update all plumbing to current code, install hidden access panels for future maintenance, and integrate subtle lighting enhancements - blending preservation with livability for 21st century homeowners.
process: Step 1: Archival research into your home's original bath features
Step 2: Materials sourcing from specialty suppliers and salvage yards
Step 3: Artisan craftsmanship replicating period construction methods
Step 4: Sensitive installation of modern conveniences
benefits: Maintains historic property value
Authentic materials stand up better than modern substitutes
Meets preservation board requirements
Creates a cohesive aesthetic throughout your home

faq.question: Can you replicate my home's original tile?
faq.answer: We work with regional ceramicists who custom-match historic glazes and shapes, often using your existing tiles as samples.

faq.question: How do you handle lead paint concerns during restoration?
faq.description: Our EPA-certified team follows strict containment protocols and tests all surfaces before beginning work.

services.name: Universal Design Bathroom
services.shortDescription: Future-proof baths with accessibility features integrated into elegant designs.
services.description:
Boston's aging housing stock often lacks thoughtful accessibility features. Our universal design approach creates baths that work beautifully at all life stages, from young families to aging residents.

We design curbless showers with textured floors for traction during humid summers, installing them at proper wheelchair-transfer heights. Vanities feature open knee spaces with removable panels for future lift access. All grab bars are elegantly integrated into tile designs - what appears to be decorative trim often provides structural support.

For multi-generational homes in Quincy or young families in Brookline, we include convertible elements like adjustable shower heads and reinforced walls for future modifications. Every design meets ADA guidelines without institutional aesthetics, using warm materials that complement New England architecture.
process: Step 1: Lifestyle assessment and mobility forecasting
Step 2: Space planning with clear floor area calculations
Step 3: Installation of reinforced blocking at all potential support points
Step 4: Testing of all clearances and turning radii
benefits: Extends independent living years
Prevents expensive retrofits later
Safer for children and elderly alike
Increases resale value with forward-thinking design

faq.question: Do accessible bathrooms look clinical?
faq.answer: We disguise functional elements within stylish designs - a mosaic tile border might conceal structural reinforcement, or a teak bench appears as luxury seating.

faq.question: Can you retrofit my existing small bathroom?
faq.answer: We specialize in space-efficient universal designs, often reconfiguring plumbing walls to gain precious inches in Boston's compact baths.

services.name: Luxury Primary Suite Bath
services.shortDescription: Spa-inspired retreats with high-end finishes and thoughtful technology.
services.description:
Boston's luxury homeowners deserve primary baths that rival Back Bay hotel suites. We design sophisticated retreats featuring radiant heated floors, towel warmers, and steam shower systems - all essential comforts during our harsh winters.

For contemporary penthouses, we install backlit onyx walls and smart toilets with bidet functions. In traditional Newton estates, we craft custom cherry vanities with integrated charging stations and undermount vessel sinks. Every design includes proper ventilation to protect fine materials from our humid summers.

We coordinate closely with architects and interior designers to ensure harmonious flow from bedroom to bath, incorporating dressing areas and discreet laundry hampers where space allows. Technology is thoughtfully integrated, from mirror TVs to app-controlled lighting scenes that adjust for morning routines versus evening relaxation.
process: Step 1: Lifestyle assessment identifying your must-have amenities
Step 2: Material selections focusing on durability and ease of maintenance
Step 3: MEP coordination for proper electrical and plumbing capacity
Step 4: Final programming of all smart systems with homeowner training
benefits: Creates a true sanctuary within your home
High-end materials chosen for longevity
Smart storage keeps counters clutter-free
Professional-grade systems for daily indulgence

faq.question: How do you prevent steam shower damage in our climate?
faq.answer: We use commercial-grade vapor barriers and install redundant ventilation systems with humidity sensors for automatic operation.

faq.question: Can you match my historic home's millwork?
faq.answer: Our custom cabinet shop replicates original profiles using stable modern materials better suited to bath environments.

services.name: Powder Room Upgrade
services.shortDescription: Maximizing impact in minimal spaces with bold design choices.
services.description:
Boston's compact powder rooms present unique design challenges we transform into opportunities. In just 15-20 square feet, we create memorable spaces that reflect your home's personality - from Beacon Hill traditional to South End eclectic.

For triple-deckers in Dorchester, we install space-saving wall-mounted sinks with generous counters. In Back Bay townhomes, we often incorporate dramatic wallpaper and pedestal sinks that nod to historic details. Every design considers traffic flow during parties and practical storage for guest essentials.

We pay particular attention to ventilation in these small spaces, specifying quiet fans with humidity sensors to prevent musty odors. Our electricians discreetly install motion-activated lighting and USB outlets for modern convenience. Even the smallest baths receive the same level of craftsmanship as our larger projects, with perfectly aligned tile and flawless trim work.
process: Step 1: Evaluation of existing mechanicals and structural limitations
Step 2: Bold material selections that make visual impact
Step 3: Precision installations in tight quarters
Step 4: Final detailing with custom caulk colors to match finishes
benefits: High ROI for relatively modest investment
Creates strong first impression for guests
Solutions for awkward plumbing locations
Upgrades that don't require lifestyle disruption

faq.question: Can you fit a full vanity in my tiny powder room?
faq.answer: We design custom floating vanities as narrow as 14" with clever integrated storage that feels surprisingly spacious.

faq.question: How do you handle old plumbing in these small spaces?
faq.answer: We often reroute pipes through adjacent closets or walls to maximize usable space without compromising access.

reviews.name: Eleanor R.
reviews.text: Horizon restored our 1896 Beacon Hill bath to its original glory while discreetly adding heated floors. They sourced perfect replica tiles and matched the original plaster medallion around our new shower. The crew treated our historic home with such respect - covering hardwood floors daily and containing all dust.

reviews.name: Marcus T.
reviews.text: After a hip replacement, I needed an accessible shower in our Cambridge Victorian. Horizon created a stunning curbless design with hidden grab bars and a teak seat that looks like luxury rather than medical equipment. Their waterproofing system gives me peace of mind in our old home.

reviews.name: Sophia L.
reviews.text: Our Newton Tudor now has a spa-like retreat with radiant heat, a steam shower, and custom cherry cabinetry. The team anticipated every detail - from outlets inside the medicine cabinet to perfect lighting for makeup application. Their project management kept everything on schedule despite supply chain delays.

reviews.name: David K.
reviews.text: Horizon transformed our dated Seaport condo bath into a sleek wet room with floor-to-ceiling marble. They solved persistent leaks from the unit above and soundproofed the walls better than the original builder. We especially appreciate their attention to winterizing details like the heated towel rack.

reviews.name: Priya N.
reviews.text: Planning for our future needs, Horizon designed a beautiful accessible bath in our Jamaica Plain home. The curbless shower has gorgeous mosaic tile that hides slip-resistant texture, and reinforced walls allow for easy grab bar additions later. It's functional now but ready for whatever comes next.

reviews.name: James W.
reviews.text: Our Back Bay townhouse's tiny powder room is now the talk of our book club! Horizon installed a floating vanity with concealed storage and dramatic black marble walls. They even found space for a discreet niche to hold spare TP. The quality exceeds what I've seen in much larger projects.

service-areas.title: Bath Remodeling Service Areas Near Boston
service-areas.description: We serve Cambridge, Newton, Brookline, Quincy and surrounding Massachusetts communities with premium bath renovations.

serviceAreas.content: Horizon Bath Remodel is proud to serve the historic city of Cambridge, MA, where Victorian homes near Harvard University showcase timeless charm. Our expertise in preserving architectural integrity while modernizing bathrooms makes us the perfect choice for Cambridge homeowners. Whether you're updating a classic clawfoot tub or installing heated floors to combat the cold snowy winters, we deliver exceptional craftsmanship tailored to your needs.
serviceAreas.localContext: Cambridge is known for its Victorian homes and prestigious academic institutions, with cold snowy winters and Nor'easters shaping the local climate.

serviceAreas.content: In Newton, MA, Horizon Bath Remodel specializes in transforming upscale Colonial and Tudor homes with luxurious bathroom renovations. Our team understands the unique demands of Newton's elegant neighborhoods, offering custom solutions that blend traditional aesthetics with modern functionality. From spa-like master baths to energy-efficient updates for chilly Nor'easter seasons, we ensure your project exceeds expectations.
serviceAreas.localContext: Newton features upscale Colonial and Tudor homes, with cold snowy winters and Nor'easters influencing local design preferences.

serviceAreas.content: Horizon Bath Remodel brings expert bathroom remodeling to Brookline, MA, where early 20th-century apartment buildings and homes abound. We excel at updating vintage spaces with contemporary amenities while respecting their historic character. Whether you're modernizing a 1930s bathroom or adding weather-resistant features for the cold snowy winters, our team delivers precision and care.
serviceAreas.localContext: Brookline is characterized by 1900s-30s apartment buildings and homes, with cold snowy winters and Nor'easters affecting the area.
